scripts.dev:feed-service: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bash -lc 'if [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate; elif [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate; else echo "Python venv not found. Run: bun run python:venv:setup"; exit 1; fi; python apps/feed-service-python/app.py'
scripts.start:prod:feed-service: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.production -- bash -lc 'if [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate; elif [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate; else echo "Python venv not found. Run: bun run python:venv:setup"; exit 1; fi; python apps/feed-service-python/app.py'
scripts.db:push: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:push
scripts.db:push:prod: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.production -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:push
scripts.db:migrate: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate:prod: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.production -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:migrate:deploy
scripts.db:seed: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:seed
scripts.db:generate: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:generate
scripts.prisma:generate: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:generate
scripts.prisma:push: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:push
scripts.prisma:migrate: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:migrate
scripts.prisma:seed: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:seed
scripts.prisma:studio: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.development -- bun run --cwd packages/db db:studio
scripts.build: bun run build:api && bun run build:worker
scripts.build:api: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.production -- bun build apps/api/src/server.ts --outdir apps/api/dist --target bun
scripts.build:worker: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.production -- bun build apps/worker/src/worker.ts --outdir apps/worker/dist --target bun
scripts.lint: bun run lint:biome && bun run lint:eslint && bun run typecheck:workspaces
scripts.lint:python: bun run python:proto:generate && bash -lc 'if [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate; elif [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate; else echo "Python venv not found. Run: bun run python:venv:setup"; exit 1; fi; python -m pylint --rcfile=apps/feed-service-python/.pylintrc apps/feed-service-python/app.py apps/feed-service-python/feed_engine.py'
scripts.python:venv:setup: python -m venv apps/feed-service-python/.venv && bash -lc 'if [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate; elif [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate; else echo "Python venv not found after creation"; exit 1; fi; python -m pip install -r apps/feed-service-python/requirements.txt'
scripts.python:install: bash -lc 'if [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate; elif [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate; else echo "Python venv not found. Run: bun run python:venv:setup"; exit 1; fi; python -m pip install -r apps/feed-service-python/requirements.txt'
scripts.python:proto:generate: bash -lc 'if [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate; elif [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate; else echo "Python venv not found. Run: bun run python:venv:setup"; exit 1; fi; mkdir -p apps/feed-service-python/generated && python -m grpc_tools.protoc -I proto --python_out=apps/feed-service-python/generated --grpc_python_out=apps/feed-service-python/generated proto/feed.proto'
scripts.python:format: bash -lc 'if [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate; elif [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate; else echo "Python venv not found. Run: bun run python:venv:setup"; exit 1; fi; python -m black apps/feed-service-python/app.py apps/feed-service-python/feed_engine.py'
scripts.python:format:check: bash -lc 'if [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate; elif [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate; else echo "Python venv not found. Run: bun run python:venv:setup"; exit 1; fi; python -m black --check apps/feed-service-python/app.py apps/feed-service-python/feed_engine.py'
scripts.python:check: bun run python:format:check && bun run python:lint
scripts.precommit:verify: bun run lint-staged && bun run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:root && bun run typecheck:workspaces
scripts.typecheck:workspaces: bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/worker typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/queue typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/eslint-config typecheck

*.py: bash -lc 'if [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/Scripts/activate; elif [ -f apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate ]; then source apps/feed-service-python/.venv/bin/activate; else echo "Python venv not found. Run: bun run python:venv:setup"; exit 1; fi; python -m pylint --rcfile=apps/feed-service-python/.pylintrc'
